title: cyperus humilis
intro: Cyperus humilis, also known as dwarf papyrus or small-flower umbrella sedge, is a perennial aquatic plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyperus humilis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Cyperus humilis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
